name: claudetest
description: Enterprise-grade Playwright (web) and Appium (mobile) test automation for Claude. Generates missing tests, diagnoses CI failures, and opens fix PRs — all from a single conversation.

auth.instructions: Connect your GitHub account to allow ClaudeTest to read your repositories, trigger workflows, and open pull requests.

tools.name: analyze_repo
tools.description: Scan a GitHub repository to identify untested flows and coverage gaps

tools.name: generate_tests
tools.description: Generate Playwright or Appium test files for specified source files

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Trigger a GitHub Actions workflow and wait for results

tools.name: diagnose_failure
tools.description: Analyze a failed CI run and explain the root cause in plain English

tools.name: create_pr
tools.description: Create a GitHub pull request with generated test files
